projectDescription: Real-time game state ingestion server for Valorant tournament overlays that processes data from observer clients and streams to broadcast frontends.
keyFeatures: Real-time WebSocket data ingestion from Valorant game observers
Dual WebSocket servers for incoming game data and outgoing broadcast streams
REST API for match previews, status checks, and team information
Match state management with automatic cleanup and replay capabilities
Authentication system with key validation and organization management
Backend integration for match tracking and supporter verification
Tournament tools data including series info, timeouts, sponsors, and player cameras
Preview mode for testing overlay configurations without active matches
publicApiSurface: GET /status - Server health and active match count
PUT /createPreview - Generate match preview with code
GET /getTeamInfoForCode - Fetch team information by group code
WebSocket port 5100 - Incoming game data from observer clients
WebSocket port 5101 - HTTPS REST API server
WebSocket port 5200 - Outgoing match data to broadcast frontends
obs_data event - Observer game state updates
aux_data event - Auxiliary player data updates
match_data event - Broadcast match state to frontends
